title: Gera' #1617
definition:
Gera = "a grain"

 1) a son of Benjamin
 2) a son of Bela and grandson of Benjamin
 3) any member of the Gera family of the Benjamite tribe
nasbUsage:
Definition: Gera = "a grain"

 1) a son of Benjamin
 2) a son of Bela and grandson of Benjamin
 3) any member of the Gera family of the Benjamite tribe

    NASB:  the name of several Isr., also a Benjamite family
